subject: Sound Healing Artist | RAV Vast Meditation Sessions
body:
Dear Monastero Santa Rosa Wellness Team,

I specialize in creating meditative sound experiences using RAV Vast (a resonant steel instrument with deep therapeutic tones).

My experience includes:

  • 4-year residency at Villa Porta creating sunset meditation sessions
  • Greece's Got Talent featured performance
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist

Sample session: Rocca Sunrise - Transcendence (RAV + Jarl Flamar)

I offer:

  • Sound bath sessions for spa guests
  • Sunset meditation accompaniment
  • Private wellness experiences

Would you be open to discussing a collaboration for your wellness programming?

Warm regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Artist | @flutur_8
videoPitch: Transcendent sound journeys with RAV Vast

subject: Sunset Sessions Artist | 4-Year Hotel Residency | RAV Vast Live
body:
Dear Alma Vibes Beach Lounge Music Team,

I'm reaching out regarding sunset music programming at Alma Vibes Beach Lounge.

Quick background:

  • 4 years resident artist at Villa Porta (Lake Maggiore) - Buddha Bar style sunset sessions
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist with live looping
  • Greece's Got Talent appearance (4 YES votes)

My sound: Live guitar remixes of classic anthems → Rocca Sunrise - Chase The Sun (Percussive Guitar)

(Planet Funk = HUGE recognition in Italy, nostalgia factor for 30-45 crowd, venue owners grew up with this)

I'd love to discuss a guest session or residency opportunity for 2026 season.

Warm regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Artist | @flutur_8
videoTitle: Rocca Sunrise - Chase The Sun (Percussive Guitar)
videoPitch: Live guitar remixes of classic anthems
